Welcome

Last updated:

ⓘ How to explore this demo

Two ways in — pick one:

1. Sign in → demo accounts already created

Tap Sign in and pick a pre-made team member to see the app from their role's perspective. Credentials are shown on the next screen.

2. I have an invite → join an existing farm

Tap I have an invite and enter code 987654 to see how a new team member accepts a farm invitation and gets real permissions for their role.

Sign in

Your phone number is your username.

ⓘ Demo account passwords use length over complexity (NIST SP 800-63B) and are unique per account — see the profiles below to copy one.

Forgot password?

ⓘ Demo accounts — already created

Tap a profile to fill in their sign-in details, then send the code and verify like a real sign-in. Verification code for all accounts: 123456

Join a farm

Enter your invite code to get started.

Invalid code. Try 987654.
Old McDonald's Farm
Code accepted — complete your profile below

ⓘ Pre-filled with a strong example password — length matters more than complexity (NIST SP 800-63B). This field is locked for the demo.

Name, phone, and role were set by the farm owner and cannot be changed. Accepting will give you full permissions for that role.

ⓘ Demo invite code

Use code 987654 to register. Then use "Sign in" to explore as Carlos or Jamie.

🔒 Account temporarily locked. Please wait 300 seconds.

Verify your identity

A verification code was sent to your phone.

Demo code: 123456

Reset password

Enter your phone number and we'll send a reset code.

ⓘ Length matters more than complexity (NIST SP 800-63B) — no forced symbols or capitals, just make it long and hard to guess.

Hygiene Report
Activity Log

Devices

Add a device

Brand names must be unique (e.g. John Deere and johndeer would be considered the same).

Helps tell apart two devices of the same model.

Device type names must be unique (not case-sensitive).

⚠️ Never enter usernames, passwords, or login credentials here.

Include dealer contact, purchase date, warranty, service contract, or any reference notes.

Network connections

Add a network connection

⚠️ Never enter usernames, passwords, or login credentials here.

Include ISP contact, router location, contract info, or any reference notes.

Apps the farm uses

Add an app

⚠️ Only enter the name of the password manager used — never the password itself or your master password.

3-2-1 Backup status

Farm settings

Used when emailing hygiene and activity reports.

🔒 Only the farm Owner can add or remove team members.
Add a team member

Enter the worker's details. They will receive an SMS invitation to download AgriGuardian and join your farm account.

Role names must be unique (not case-sensitive).

The worker will receive an SMS with instructions to download AgriGuardian and join your farm account.

Time zone used for all timestamps

All timestamps in the app will reflect this time zone regardless of where you are viewing from.

Only the farm Owner can change the time zone.
Auto sign-out after inactivity

Shorter timeout recommended for shared or field devices.

App language
Large text
Increases text size across the whole app
Extra large text
Maximum text size for low vision
High contrast
Stronger contrast between text and backgrounds
Color-blind mode
Adds shapes alongside colors for risk levels
Reduced motion
Disables transitions and animations

These settings and your language choice apply to this session only, until you save them as your personal default.

Password requirements

Password complexity rules will be enforced in production — minimum length, uppercase, number, and special character required.

Vulnerability databases

CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities

Automatically checked — no setup required. CISA publishes actively exploited vulnerabilities that AgriGuardian checks against your device brands.

Connected
NVD — National Vulnerability Database

NVD provides detailed CVE records searchable by model number. In production, AgriGuardian would connect to NVD through a secure backend server — the API key would never be exposed to the browser.

Production architecture: The NVD API key lives on AgriGuardian's server. The app sends a request to the server, the server calls NVD, and returns results — the key never touches the browser. This is standard practice for protecting API credentials in web applications.
Pending backend integration
Production security

🔐 Data encryption: All data encrypted in transit (TLS) and at rest (AES-256) in production.

💾 Backup strategy: Automated daily backups with 30-day retention planned for production.

🏗️ Architecture: Core features in base app. Advanced analytics offered as optional add-ons.

📊 Performance: App evaluated for load time and database efficiency at each release milestone.
